results.title: The Destination Channel Wins Four Emmy Awards at the 2026 Pacific Southwest Emmy Awards
results.description: Staycation earns Best Long-Form Lifestyle Series, with additional Emmy Awards recognizing excellence in hosting, editing, and narration across The Destination Channel's original programming. results.title: Sam Neill, New Zealand actor who starred in 'Jurassic Park' and 'The Piano,' dies at 78
results.description: Sam Neill, the elegant and versatile actor who moved from art films to blockbusters like “Jurassic Park” and “The Hunt for Red October,” has died at 78. He said he had a rare type of lymphoma in 2023. His family...

results.title: Deadly screwworm’s invasion mystifies health experts
results.description: The detections, so far totaling 32 animals, including sheep and goats, have largely clustered in southern Texas
